basic_details.job_title: NABFINS Cluster Head Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: NABFINS has published the Cluster Head Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill Cluster Head positions for Madhya Pradesh and Maharashtra locations. Candidates within the maximum age limit of 37 years and holding Graduation and above qualification with relevant experience in MFI or Banking sector are eligible to apply online at NABFINS Official Website. The application process will be active until 22-05-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Cluster Head - Madhya Pradesh: Maximum age is 37 years. Cluster Head - Maharashtra: Maximum age is 37 years.

qualification.details: Cluster Head - Madhya Pradesh: Graduation and above. 4 years and above experience with MFI, Banking in managing multiple branch portfolio. Cluster Head - Maharashtra: Graduation and above. 4 years and above experience with MFI, Banking in managing multiple branch portfolio.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NABFINS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Nabfins Cluster Head posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 22 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Cluster Head position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduation degree or an equivalent qualification to be eligible for the Cluster Head role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for applying to Nabfins Cluster Head positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Cluster Head positions is 37 years.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Nabfins Cluster Head recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to send their resume via email to [email protected] before the last date of application.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for Nabfins Cluster Head recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Cluster Head post?
faq.answer: The official notification indicates that there are 0 vacancies for the Cluster Head positions.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for Full Time positions within the banking sector.

faq.question: Q8. Which states are covered under this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is open for candidates across India, with specific mention of Cluster Head roles for Madhya Pradesh and Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q9. What is the required experience for the Cluster Head role?
faq.answer: Candidates should have 4 years or more of experience in MFI or Banking, specifically in managing multiple branch portfolios.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for Nabfins Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
